    @pytest.mark.P0
    def test_modify_community_nickname(self, community_api, user2_community_api):
        """两个用户分别修改社区昵称"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        nick_data = data["nickname"]
    
        # 生成随机昵称
        dashen_nick = _random_nick(nick_data["dashen_prefix"])
        user2_nick = nick_data["user2_value"]
    
        # Step 1: 大神修改昵称
        with allure.step(f"大神修改社区昵称为: {dashen_nick}"):
            resp = community_api.upd_user_server_ext(
                server_id=community["self_server_id"],
                server_nick_name=dashen_nick,
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
